title: Hometopia
description:
Welcome to HometopiaThe ultimate free-form building game where your creativity knows no bounds. Forget life simulation distractions; here, it’s all about pure, uninterrupted creative freedom to design and build the home of your dreams. Unleash your inner architect, express your unique style, and collaborate with friends in real-time multiplayer. From cozy cottages to sprawling modern mansions, your vision becomes reality in a community of passionate Topians. Build without limits and share your creations with the world.

Experience True Creative Freedom in Sandbox ModeDesign your dream home with no constraints, an unlimited budget, and endless possibilities. Build in any style that matches your taste, from classic to contemporary, with stunning high-fidelity graphics.

Collaborate or Create SoloTeam up with friends to tackle massive projects, design entire neighborhoods, or simply decorate a home together. Prefer to work alone? The choice is yours.

Show Off Your Interior Design SkillsCustomize everything with thousands of objects at your fingertips. Experiment with countless styles, layouts, and themes to create the perfect fit for every space.

Jumpstart Your Vision with Ready-Made HomesUse pre-built houses as inspiration or a foundation for your next masterpiece. Decorate, customize, and transform them to match your unique vision.

Personalize Every DetailChoose from any color, pattern, or texture to make your designs truly one of a kind. Every detail is yours to shape.

Capture and Share Your CreationsUse the built-in camera tool to snap stunning photos of your spaces. Share your work with the world and inspire others in the Hometopia community.

Build Inside and OutDon’t stop at the walls! Create breathtaking outdoor spaces with Hometopia’s powerful landscaping tools. Design lush gardens, stylish patios, and dreamy backyards.

Create and Showcase Your PortfolioCompile your favorite builds into a stunning portfolio that you can share with the world. Let your designs shine and inspire others!

Whether you’re building solo or with friends, Hometopia offers endless possibilities to craft, create, and share your dream homes. Start your journey today and join a thriving community of creators!
description_short: Hometopia — это лучший симулятор дизайна и строительства домов, предлагающий безграничные возможности настройки и потрясающую графику. Создавайте дома мечты или целые районы, в одиночку или с друзьями. Воплотите свои архитектурные идеи так, как вы их представляете.
